Editor, Spokane Press-There is
at least one woman in Spokane
who heartily disagrees with the
gentleman VIII ovoiced his senti-
ment on the philosophy of matri-
mony. He asserts that couple
who remain long a couple without
developing into family have
much to be ashamed of.


| regret that many more men
are not tied to the apron strings of
childless wives, and / wish to ex-
press my regard for the gentleman
who is in sympathy with the would
be mother. My reason for advo-
eating the fruitless marriage is,
however, not based on the physical
pains of motherhood. but is con-
fined mostly to the child or chill
dren helplessly put into a world
OF misery and struggle.


j refer to the children of the
masses, for they are looked to to
ever increase and multiply. These
children grind out their youth and
lives in our modern mills and fac
tories; these children, made in the
image and likeness of God are sold
as slaves under our church caves.
The children of the masses are
forced to go out into the world
uDeducated and face the hardships
which can only be realized by
those who stand daily with their
nose to the grindstone.


Why limit the contest to SIS per
week when the average wages paid
in Spokane falls far below the SIS
mark, and whole families are
forced to exist on little over one
half that amount? A gentleman
In public office in this city was
asked u few days ago If he knew
of existing conditions in some of
the drygoods houses in this city
which ought to come under his
jurisdiction" He replied he did
not. but ] do know" he said,
that girls should stay at home and
learn TO cook and sew, rather than
flock to the different places of EN-
ployment." He didn't seem to
know that the average head of a
family In Spokane as we'll as else
where Is unable, with the present
wages, to properly clothe and feed
HIS family, and that girls are
forced into the industrial world
without choice. We must remem-
Der that these children who fare
30 poorly in the comforts anp
Injuries enjoyed by their more
prosperous sisters are not lacking
IN brain--nerely a chance to de
yelop.

nbhors abuse. And while the Lord
intended a full development of. rho
human race he also Intended that
one and all. regardless OF class, en-

verse,
